title: May 11, 2026
sentiment: The tools we trust were built by someone we never met, and even the ones we build ourselves eventually let us down.

stories.title: Postmortem: TanStack NPM supply-chain compromise
stories.summary: A trusted dependency becomes a doorway — the compromise was not in what you wrote but in what you installed without thinking.

stories.title: GitLab announces workforce reduction and end of their CREDIT values
stories.summary: Values held publicly are only values until they cost something; then they are quietly retired.

stories.title: Hardware Attestation as Monopoly Enabler
stories.summary: The machine that is supposed to protect you can also decide who is allowed to use it — and that is a design choice, not a law of physics.
